TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ti Drangadrang Yang Yung-wei (楊勇緯, 1997.9.28- ), a judoka nua Taiwan timadju, izua a pungadanngadan a sinsi uta i na sihu taiwan daigaku pakata undu timadju. ka 2021 a cavilj, timadju kicaciur tua 2020 aulingpiya undukai imaza i ripun i tukiyu , saka timadju na kialap tua masanmusalj, masan angata sangasangasan a unduin na djemamek tua juduka a pakaleva, avan auta sangasangasan a unduin kialap tua nibang a pakaleva pakata 60kg juduka a 項目 nua i aulingpiya undukai a cinalivatan. ti drangadrang timadju sesisigu nua i qakaw king, se payuan timadju.
S.PHON: ti ɖaŋaɖaŋ jaŋ juŋ-wəi (***, ****.*.**- ), a juduka nua taiwan timaɉu, izua a puŋadanŋadan a sinsi uta i na sihu taiwan daigaku pakata undu timaɉu. ka **** a ʦaviʎ, timaɉu kiʦaʦiur tua **** auɭiŋpija undukai imaza i ripun i tukiju , saka timaɉu na kiaɭap tua masanmusaʎ, masan aŋata saŋasaŋasan a unduin na ɉəmamək tua juduka a pakaɭəva, avan auta saŋasaŋasan a unduin kiaɭap tua nibaŋ a pakaɭəva pakata **kg juduka a ** nua i auɭiŋpija undukai a ʦinaɭivatan. ti ɖaŋaɖaŋ timaɉu səsisigu nua i qakaw kiŋ, sə pajuan timaɉu.
S.FORM: ti Drangadrang Yang Yung-wei (楊勇緯, 1997.9.28- ), a judoka nua Taiwan timadju, izua a pungadanngadan a sinsi uta i na sihu taiwan daigaku pakata undu timadju. ka 2021 a cavilj, timadju kicaciur tua 2020 aulingpiya undukai imaza i ripun i tukiyu , saka timadju na kialap tua masanmusalj, masan angata sangasangasan a unduin na djemamek tua juduka a pakaleva, avan auta sangasangasan a unduin kialap tua nibang a pakaleva pakata 60kg juduka a 項目 nua i aulingpiya undukai a cinalivatan. ti drangadrang timadju sesisigu nua i qakaw king, se payuan timadju.
S.PHON: ti ɖaŋaɖaŋ jaŋ juŋ-wəi (***, ****.*.**- ), a juduka nua taiwan timaɉu, izua a puŋadanŋadan a sinsi uta i na sihu taiwan daigaku pakata undu timaɉu. ka **** a ʦaviʎ, timaɉu kiʦaʦiur tua **** auɭiŋpija undukai imaza i ripun i tukiju , saka timaɉu na kiaɭap tua masanmusaʎ, masan aŋata saŋasaŋasan a unduin na ɉəmamək tua juduka a pakaɭəva, avan auta saŋasaŋasan a unduin kiaɭap tua nibaŋ a pakaɭəva pakata **kg juduka a ** nua i auɭiŋpija undukai a ʦinaɭivatan. ti ɖaŋaɖaŋ timaɉu səsisigu nua i qakaw kiŋ, sə pajuan timaɉu.
